manualSteps:
**Enable Google sign-in.** Your Mocha users signed in with Google, so we added a Google sign-in button to your app. To make it work, paste your Google OAuth credentials below.

If you don't have these yet, create an OAuth client at [Google Cloud Console](https://console.cloud.google.com/apis/credentials) and set the authorized redirect URI to `https://<your-app>.created.app/api/auth/callback/google`.
